name: Spargel in Weisser Sosse (White Asparagus in White Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 4 oz Ham, cut into Julienne Strips
recipeInstructions:
1. Drain the asparagus spears and reserve half a cup of the liquid.
2. Heat the margarine in a saucepan.
3. Add the flour and blend it in.
4. Gradually pour in the asparagus liquid and milk.
5. Stir constantly over low heat until the sauce thickens and bubbles.
6. Add the cooked ham and seasonings.
7. Gently stir in the asparagus spears.
8. Heat through but do not boil. Serve in a preheated serving dish.
